errors.category: System Execution Errors > Configuration > Tool Definition Issues
errors.evidence: Code execution failed at line 'from Bio.PDB import PDBParser' due to: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'Bio'
errors.description: The Biopython library was not installed or correctly defined in the environment, causing a ModuleNotFoundError.
errors.impact: Prevented the agent from executing the primary task using Biopython.

errors.category: Planning and Coordination Errors > Task Management > Tool Selection Errors
errors.evidence: FileConversionException: Could not convert 'data/gaia/validation/7dd30055-0198-452e-8c25-f73dbe27dcb8.pdb' to Markdown
errors.description: The inspect_file_as_text tool was incorrectly used for a .pdb file, which it does not support.
errors.impact: Resulted in failed attempts to parse the PDB file.

errors.category: System Execution Errors > Configuration > Environment Setup Errors
errors.evidence: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'data/gaia/validation/7dd30055-0198-452e-8c25-f73dbe27dcb8.pdb'
errors.description: The required PDB file was not accessible in the execution environment.
errors.impact: Prevented file parsing and forced reliance on alternative methods.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple critical errors (missing library, incorrect tool usage, file access issues) reduced reliability, but the agent eventually succeeded via alternative methods.
scores.security_reasoning: No security-related issues were identified in the trace.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: The agent ultimately provided the correct answer but deviated from the specified Biopython-based approach due to errors.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Retry attempts and tool switching indicated suboptimal planning and resource management.
